name: Lenny Pickett
abstract: Lenny Pickett (born April 10, 1954)  is an American saxophonist and musical director of the Saturday Night Live band. From 1973 to 1981, he was a member of the band Tower of Power.

concerts.label: Rainforest Foundation Benefit Concert
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Josiah Gluck
about_quotes.evidence: I’ve worked with Lenny a lot and we’ll always record the theme on a Saturday morning when the band is rehearsing
about_quotes.doc_title: Josiah Gluck interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 13, 2022
